scripts.pub-core: npm unpublish @clickapp/qui-core@0.0.7 --force --registry http://localhost:4873 && npm run build -w @clickapp/qui-core && npm publish -w @clickapp/qui-core --registry http://localhost:4873
scripts.pub-bs: npm unpublish @clickapp/qui-bootstrap@0.0.6  --registry http://localhost:4873 && npm run build -w @clickapp/qui-bootstrap && npm publish -w @clickapp/qui-bootstrap --registry http://localhost:4873
